events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: missing knockout filler in panelboard installation & makeup. Stage rough-complete. Condition installed-defective. Decision fail because non-compliant? Missing knockout filler violates NEC 408.7? Actually NEC 408.7 requires unused openings for switches, overcurrent devices, etc. to be closed. Panelboard unused knockouts must be filled. Also could affect working clearance? Not directly. Risk maybe medium? Missing knockout filler can allow access to energized parts, foreign objects, reduce enclosure integrity. In commercial project, fail. Need findings: open knockout holes in panelboard enclosure, missing closure plugs, potential exposure to live parts, violation of 408.7. Actions: install listed knockout fillers/seals in all unused openings, verify all openings closed before inspection. Rationale. References: NEC Art. 408 (panelboards), specifically 408.7? Also 110.3(B) installation per listing? 110.12? The reference material given: NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. We can include 408.7 (unused openings). 110.26 not directly. 200.4 about terminal identification? Not relevant. But we can reference NEC 408.7 and 110.3(B). The prompt says apply rather than quote mechanically. Use component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 85? Work roughed in but missing filler. value 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty string. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.
